title: void_fapiao
description: Void an issued fapiao or issue a red-letter (negative) fapiao for corrections. Red-letter fapiao (红字发票) are required when the original has already been claimed for tax deduction.

action.description: void: void same-month fapiao; red_letter: issue corrective negative fapiao

fapiao_id.description: Internal ID of the original fapiao

reason.description: Reason for voiding or red-letter issuance

red_letter_info_number.description: Red-letter information form number (红字信息表编号, required for special VAT red-letter)

original_line_index.description: Index of the original line item (0-based)

partial_items.description: Partial red-letter: specific items to reverse (omit to reverse all)
